other_observers: Joey Kellner Brandon Percival Lisa Edwards Joe Roller; Joey Kellner origianlly found this bird on 29 September 2006 in same area
description: Overall buff most noticeably on face and breast. Relatively short dark bill Yellow legs Dark spots on sides of breast.  At times, upright posture. Small head look. Scaly back with dark centers to feathers with fresh thin whitish fringes, therefore a juvenile In flight bright white underwings.Behaviors: Probed mud, mostly in wet mud areas. First seen on higher drier sandy substrate.  Fed with Least and Baird's Sandpipers and many KilldeerCall: none heardPlumage: juvenile
